MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
PETITIONER CARPENTERS 46 NORTHERN CALIFORNIA COUNTIES CONFERENCE BOARD'S Petition To Confirm Arbitration award IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. Prevailing party is to prepare a form of order. (PRINCIPAL- $79,932.55) Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR# 8189 =301/PJB
